name: pi-quests
description: Private personal Pi extension for validation-first quest orchestration

scripts.verify: bun test && bun run scripts/evals.ts --suite regression && bun run scripts/smoke.ts
scripts.verify:full: bun run verify && bun run scripts/evals.ts --suite capability && bun run scripts/evals-scenario.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json
